entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `muchikTerm` TEXT NOT NULL, `spanishTranslation` TEXT NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `emoji` TEXT NOT NULL, `etymologyNote` TEXT NOT NULL, `sourceReference` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAt` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`muchikTerm` TEXT NOT NULL, `spanishTranslation` TEXT NOT NULL, `etymologyNote` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`word_entry`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_word_entry_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `word_entry` BEGIN DELETE FROM `word_entry_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_word_entry_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `word_entry` BEGIN DELETE FROM `word_entry_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_word_entry_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `word_entry` BEGIN INSERT INTO `word_entry_fts`(`docid`, `muchikTerm`, `spanishTranslation`, `etymologyNote`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`muchikTerm`, NEW.`spanishTranslation`, NEW.`etymologyNote`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_word_entry_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `word_entry` BEGIN INSERT INTO `word_entry_fts`(`docid`, `muchikTerm`, `spanishTranslation`, `etymologyNote`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`muchikTerm`, NEW.`spanishTranslation`, NEW.`etymologyNote`); END

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '8f3fa122c45444a2c99cf2b94b945df4')
